name.description: Name of the signed URL key.

key_value.description: 128-bit key value used for signing the URL. The key value must be a valid RFC 4648 Section 5 base64url encoded string. **Note**: This property is sensitive and will not be displayed in the plan.

backend_service.description: The backend service this signed URL key belongs.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
